worldgriddeployer.mode.description: Places into crossed cells of the stationary world
worldgriddeployer.config.title: Create World-Grid Deployer
worldgriddeployer.config.subtitle: Configuration and diagnostics
worldgriddeployer.config.debug.tooltip: Configure local geometry and server-authoritative placement overlays for this connection.
worldgriddeployer.config.debug.offline.t: Configure client viewing preferences without joining a world. Local histories begin fresh on join; authoritative outcomes still require a compatible server and its permission policy.
worldgriddeployer.config.access.tooltip: Inspect the outcome-stream policy and, with permission level 3, edit it safely on the server.
worldgriddeployer.config.access.private_: A private single-player world has no remote players to authorize. Open it to LAN to expose these controls.
worldgriddeployer.config.access.unsuppor: This server did not negotiate the World-Grid settings channel. Its server access policy cannot be viewed or changed from this client.
worldgriddeployer.config.world_required: Join a world or server before configuring connection-scoped debugging.
worldgriddeployer.config.cancel.tooltip: Discard unsaved changes and return to the previous screen.
worldgriddeployer.config.debug.title: World-Grid Debug Overlays
worldgriddeployer.config.debug.subtitle: Connection-scoped histories; maximum %s seconds
worldgriddeployer.config.debug.targets.t: Draws each deployer's exact working point and candidate world block through terrain. Green means locally powered; red means locally unpowered.
worldgriddeployer.config.debug.point_pat: Draws a fading cyan line through the precise floating-point target samples. Breaks mark inactivity, teleports, or missing samples.
worldgriddeployer.config.debug.block_tra: Draws fading blue boxes for every world cell the client traversal predicts could be visited. It does not prove placement succeeded.
Requests actual server placement results. Availability follows the server policy; denied requests remain pending while connected.

Keeps this viewing preference for the next connection, then requests actual placement results after joining. A server without this mod or without permission simply provides no authoritative outcome data.
This server did not negotiate the optional outcome channel. The preference remains visible, but no request is sent and no authoritative result boxes are available here.
Click to cycle how long this category remains visible. Changing it starts a fresh history for that category.
worldgriddeployer.config.debug.all_on.to: Turns every overlay on when you select Done.
worldgriddeployer.config.debug.all_off.t: Turns every overlay off and clears its history when you select Done.
worldgriddeployer.config.debug.clear.too: Immediately discards all collected points, blocks, live targets, and outcomes without changing which categories are enabled.
worldgriddeployer.config.debug.save.tool: Apply these client-local settings. Server Outcomes also updates the current connection's subscription.
worldgriddeployer.config.access.title: Server Outcome Access
Integrated LAN server — read-only (cheats or operator permission required)
Remote server — read-only (operator permission level 3 required)
Waiting for the server's authoritative settings snapshot.
worldgriddeployer.config.access.locked.t: Read-only: the server did not grant this player command permission level 3.
worldgriddeployer.config.access.policy.t: Controls only the authoritative outcome stream. Local target, path, and candidate-block overlays remain client-side.
worldgriddeployer.config.access.policy.c: Click to choose the next policy. Select Apply Changes to update the server.
worldgriddeployer.config.access.policy.d: Current selection: nobody receives outcomes, including operators.
worldgriddeployer.config.access.policy.o: Current selection: only server operators receive outcomes. This is the default.
worldgriddeployer.config.access.policy.w: Current selection: operators and listed players receive outcomes. The list is preserved under other policies.
worldgriddeployer.config.access.policy.p: Current selection: every connected client with this mod may receive outcomes after opting in.
worldgriddeployer.config.access.username: Type a username for live server-backed verification. Unknown names may still be saved and will resolve when that player first joins.
worldgriddeployer.config.access.add.tool: Adds this name to your unsaved batch. Verified accounts resolve immediately; unknown names remain pending until a matching player joins.
worldgriddeployer.config.access.autocomp: Known names autocomplete as you type. Press Tab to accept a suggestion or Enter to add the exact text.
worldgriddeployer.config.access.remove.t: Click to mark this player for removal. Apply Changes updates the policy and player list together.
worldgriddeployer.config.access.remove_p: Click to remove this pending username. It has not resolved to a UUID yet.
worldgriddeployer.config.access.keep.too: Click to keep this player and cancel the pending removal.
worldgriddeployer.config.access.undo_add: Click to undo this addition before applying the changes.
Discard unsaved changes and reload the current authoritative settings from the server.
worldgriddeployer.config.access.save.too: Apply the policy, resolved players, and pending usernames as one revision-checked update.
worldgriddeployer.config.access.save.no_: There are no unsaved policy or player-list changes.
worldgriddeployer.config.access.entry.pe: %s will be resolved to a stored identity when changes are applied.
worldgriddeployer.config.access.entry.aw: Saved username: %s. A case-insensitive matching login automatically converts it to that authenticated UUID.
worldgriddeployer.config.access.lookup.p: Type a username to verify it or save it for first join.
worldgriddeployer.config.access.lookup.c: Checking this username with the server…
worldgriddeployer.config.access.lookup.s: On this server now: %s — UUID can bind immediately.
worldgriddeployer.config.access.lookup.f: Official account exists: %s — server identity binds on first join.
worldgriddeployer.config.access.lookup.n: No account found now — it can still be saved pending.
worldgriddeployer.config.access.lookup.o: Offline mode cannot verify accounts; this name will resolve on join.
worldgriddeployer.config.access.lookup.n: Read-only: the server did not allow username lookup.
worldgriddeployer.config.access.lookup.e: Lookup unavailable; this name can still be saved pending.
worldgriddeployer.config.access.lookup.d: %s is already present in this batch or whitelist.
worldgriddeployer.config.access.result.r: Read-only settings loaded; operator permission level 3 is required to edit.
worldgriddeployer.config.access.result.s: Settings changed elsewhere; the latest server state was reloaded.
worldgriddeployer.config.access.result.n: The server refused the edit because permission is no longer sufficient.
worldgriddeployer.config.access.result.u: The server could not resolve player ‘%s’; no changes were applied.
worldgriddeployer.config.access.result.i: The server rejected invalid settings (%s); no changes were applied.
worldgriddeployer.config.access.result.e: Enter a valid Minecraft username before adding it.
worldgriddeployer.config.access.result.d: %s is already in the player list.
worldgriddeployer.config.access.result.s: %s will be verified or saved pending when you apply the batch.
worldgriddeployer.config.access.result.r: %s will be removed when you select Apply Changes.
